Profile

WHO I AM

Results-driven digital professional with 5+ years of hands-on experience in e-commerce operations, brand development, web design, and AI-powered content creation. I combine 5 years of advanced Etsy marketplace management and 4 years of strategic eBay optimisation with deep expertise across Shopify, WooCommerce, Salla, and Zid platforms.

Expert at synthesizing system logic with high-value visual strategy — possessing a strong background in creative graphic design and iconic logo blueprinting. Proficient in utilising adaptive AI coding (Claude, OpenAI Codex) to build customised e-commerce automations, develop AI chatbots, and execute high-converting digital advertising campaigns for the Saudi Arabia (KSA) and GCC ecosystem.
